warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
The fukui-reactivity analysis on benzaldehyde was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. Mulliken partial charges from PySCF were used for the calculation.

The most electrophilic atom is Carbon (C) at index 3 (0-based index 2) with a Fukui f+ index of 0.39939.
The most nucleophilic atom is Oxygen (O) at index 1 (0-based index 0) with a Fukui f- index of 0.23840.
